package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_starts_db_transaction: Middleware that opens database transactions for the whole request path by default.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule090NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule090NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule090NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario090Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule090NegativeService, input Rule090NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
